title: agrimonia dahurica var. glabrata
intro: Agrimonia dahurica var. glabrata, also known as the smooth agrimony, is a variety of the agrimonia plant native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of agrimonia dahurica var. glabrata include reducing menstrual cramps, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and extracts that can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
